title: OpenAI: $110 Billion Raised Series G. Still No Moat?
excerpt: OpenAI just raised $110B to push the AI frontier — while warning about adversarial distillation and free-riding on model outputs. The distillation era is already here.
author: OpenDistil Team

title: OpenAI and Anthropic Are Panicking About Distillation at Scale
excerpt: Frontier AI labs are raising alarms about large-scale distillation. But productionized distillation may reshape the economics of AI faster than they expect.
author: OpenDistil Team

title: Launching OpenDistil: Distillation-as-a-Service
excerpt: Today we're launching OpenDistil — making frontier-level AI accessible to every lab and startup.
author: OpenDistil Team

title: Why Model Distillation Matters for the Future of AI
excerpt: Distillation is quietly becoming the most important technique in AI deployment. Here's why every AI lab should pay attention.
author: OpenDistil Team

title: Distillation vs Fine-Tuning: When to Use What
excerpt: Both techniques optimize models, but they serve very different purposes. We break down the trade-offs.
author: OpenDistil Team
